australia.title: Why choose Australia
australia.body: Australia combines strong education exports, post-study work options for many graduates, and skilled migration pathways linked to occupation demand. Planning should balance course quality, regional living costs, and how study fits any longer-term goals—not assume PR follows automatically.
bullets: World-class universities and VET in major cities and regional centres
Temporary Graduate visa may follow eligible study—confirm current rules
Skilled lists and state nomination change with policy cycles

australia.title: Student visa pathway
australia.body: Student visas are temporary. You need a confirmed enrolment, genuine student intent, health insurance (OSHC), and funds evidence that match Department thresholds for your cohort.
bullets: CoE from a registered provider before lodgement
OSHC for the visa period
Work rights are capped—check current hours on your grant

australia.title: Skilled migration pathway
australia.body: Points-tested visas (189/190/491) depend on occupation lists, skills assessment, English scores, and invitation rounds. Study alone does not guarantee skilled eligibility.
bullets: Skills assessment timing can add months
State nomination may require regional residence
Compare independent vs sponsored routes early

australia.title: Work rights overview
australia.body: Most student visa holders may work limited hours during study terms and more in scheduled breaks—verify conditions on your visa grant letter.
bullets: Casual hospitality and retail are common first jobs
Tax and super apply from day one
Do not breach work-hour conditions

australia.title: Estimated study and living costs
australia.body: Sydney and Melbourne sit at the top of living bands; Brisbane and Adelaide are often lower. Tuition varies sharply between university and VET providers.
bullets: Budget AUD 22k–52k+ tuition per year for many courses
Living often AUD 1,700–2,800/month in major cities
Use our student cost planner for indicative bands

australia.title: PR pathway overview
australia.body: Some graduates pursue Temporary Graduate then skilled or employer-sponsored routes. Occupation ceilings, age, and English thresholds still apply—PR is a separate application with no guarantee.
bullets: Graduate work visa is time-limited
Skilled points and employer sponsorship are distinct tracks
Policy changes can close pathways you planned around

australia.title: Common refusal or risk factors
australia.body: Genuine temporary entrant concerns, inconsistent funds, course misalignment with background, or incomplete health/character documents are frequent issues.
bullets: Funds that do not match declared sources
Course level unrelated to prior study/work
Gaps in employment or study history without explanation

australia.title: Documents to prepare
australia.body: Start a document pack early: identity, enrolment, funds, English results, health insurance, and any relationship or dependent records.
bullets: Passport, birth/marriage certificates
Bank statements and income evidence
OSHC policy and CoE

canada.title: Why choose Canada
canada.body: Canada offers diverse provinces with different living costs, strong post-secondary institutions, and pathways from study permits to post-graduation work permits and Express Entry for some profiles.
bullets: DLI acceptance is central to study permits
Provincial nominee programs vary by region
Bilingual markets can affect job options in Quebec

canada.title: Student visa pathway
canada.body: Study permits require acceptance from a designated learning institution, proof of funds, and often a provincial attestation letter where applicable.
bullets: Letter of acceptance before applying
Funds per IRCC tables for your province
Biometrics and medical exams may apply

canada.title: Skilled migration pathway
canada.body: Express Entry and provincial nominee streams use separate points and selection rules. Canadian work experience and language scores heavily influence outcomes.
bullets: Credential assessments (ECA) for foreign qualifications
CRS score competitiveness changes each draw
PNP may require job offers or regional ties

canada.title: Work rights overview
canada.body: Study permit holders may work on-campus always; off-campus work has hour limits that IRCC updates—check your permit conditions.
bullets: Co-op programs need a co-op work permit
Spousal open work permits may be available in some cases
SIN required for legal employment

canada.title: Estimated study and living costs
canada.body: Toronto and Vancouver are expensive; prairie cities often lower. Tuition for international students exceeds domestic rates significantly.
bullets: CAD 18k–45k+ annual tuition bands for many programs
Living CAD 1,400–2,400/month depending on city
GIC or proof of funds per IRCC guidance

canada.title: PR pathway overview
canada.body: Post-graduation work permits can bridge to Canadian experience class or provincial nomination—but caps, program length, and policy changes affect who qualifies.
bullets: PGWP length ties to program duration
Express Entry is competitive, not automatic
Quebec has a separate selection system

canada.title: Common refusal or risk factors
canada.body: Insufficient funds, study plan not credible, prior refusals, or misaligned program choices are common themes in refusals.
bullets: Funds not held long enough
Program unrelated to career story
Incomplete PAL or DLI documentation

canada.title: Documents to prepare
canada.body: Gather acceptance letters, financial proof, identity documents, and any police certificates required for your country of residence.
bullets: DLI letter of acceptance
Proof of funds / GIC where used
Medical exam if requested

united-kingdom.title: Why choose the United Kingdom
united-kingdom.body: The UK offers shorter postgraduate degrees for many courses, global graduate route options for eligible completions, and skilled worker sponsorship for in-demand roles—each with strict sponsor and maintenance rules.
bullets: Russell Group and specialist colleges across regions
Graduate Route may follow eligible study—check current policy
London living costs exceed most other UK cities

united-kingdom.title: Student visa pathway
united-kingdom.body: Student route visas need a CAS from a licensed sponsor, maintenance funds, and English evidence at the required level for your course.
bullets: CAS issued by licensed sponsor
Maintenance held for 28+ days in many cases
TB test from listed countries

united-kingdom.title: Skilled migration pathway
united-kingdom.body: Skilled Worker visas need employer sponsorship, eligible occupation, salary thresholds, and English requirements. Points-based skilled routes differ from student routes.
bullets: Certificate of Sponsorship from licensed employer
Salary must meet going rates for the role
Health and care visa has separate lists

united-kingdom.title: Work rights overview
united-kingdom.body: Student visa work limits apply during term time; full-time work may be allowed in vacations—confirm your vignette and BRP/digital status conditions.
bullets: Part-time roles common in retail and hospitality
Placements must align with course requirements
Self-employment is generally restricted

united-kingdom.title: Estimated study and living costs
united-kingdom.body: London maintenance requirements exceed other regions. Tuition for international students varies widely between classroom and lab-based degrees.
bullets: GBP 14k–38k+ tuition bands for many courses
Living GBP 1,100–2,000/month by city
NHS health surcharge payable with application

united-kingdom.title: PR pathway overview
united-kingdom.body: Settlement (ILR) usually requires years of eligible visa residence—not automatic after study. Graduate Route is temporary bridging for many.
bullets: Graduate Route does not count toward all settlement routes equally
Skilled Worker can lead to ILR after qualifying years
Rules change with Home Office policy statements

united-kingdom.title: Common refusal or risk factors
united-kingdom.body: Maintenance shortfalls, credibility of study intent, prior immigration breaches, or incorrect CAS details trigger refusals.
bullets: Funds in wrong account type or timing
Course progression not explained
Previous UK overstays or refusals

united-kingdom.title: Documents to prepare
united-kingdom.body: CAS, financial evidence, passports, TB certificate if required, and academic transcripts supporting your study plan.
bullets: Valid CAS reference
Bank statements meeting GOV.UK amounts
English test results if required

new-zealand.title: Why choose New Zealand
new-zealand.body: New Zealand offers smaller cities, outdoor lifestyle appeal, and study-to-work transitions for some qualifications—but the market is smaller and skilled lists are selective.
bullets: Institutions in Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch and regions
Post-study work visas depend on qualification level
Partnership and skilled categories have separate criteria

new-zealand.title: Student visa pathway
new-zealand.body: Fee-paying student visas need an offer of place, funds, genuine intent, and health/character clearance.
bullets: Offer of place from approved provider
Funds per INZ tables for your stay
Medical and police certificates if required

new-zealand.title: Skilled migration pathway
new-zealand.body: Skilled Migrant Category uses points for age, work experience, qualifications, and job offers. Green List roles may have streamlined residence pathways.
bullets: Job offer may be required for many skilled routes
Qualification recognition varies
Policy caps affect invitation timing

new-zealand.title: Work rights overview
new-zealand.body: Student visa holders may work part-time during study and full-time in scheduled breaks if conditions allow—check your visa label.
bullets: Hospitality and agriculture seasonal work exist regionally
Minimum wage applies
Breaching conditions risks visa cancellation

new-zealand.title: Estimated study and living costs
new-zealand.body: Auckland is typically the most expensive city; regional study can reduce living costs but may limit job variety.
bullets: NZD 22k–42k+ tuition bands for many international courses
Living NZD 1,500–2,400/month
Funds evidence per INZ checklist

new-zealand.title: PR pathway overview
new-zealand.body: Post-study work visas can bridge to skilled residence for some occupations—not all courses lead to residence eligibility.
bullets: Qualification level affects post-study work length
Green List occupations change
Residence is never automatic after study

new-zealand.title: Common refusal or risk factors
new-zealand.body: Genuine intent, funds source, health issues, or prior immigration history are common refusal themes.
bullets: Insufficient funds history
Study plan inconsistent with background
Incomplete medical or character docs

new-zealand.title: Documents to prepare
new-zealand.body: Offer letter, funds proof, passport, photos, and any relationship documents for partners or dependents.
bullets: Offer of place and fee payment evidence
Bank statements or sponsorship letters
Police certificates where required
